description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.12.0 Docker image and defines a single build stage. Add a build job in the build stage with variables ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=28, ANDROID_NDK_VERSION=r18b, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=4333796. Its before_script runs apt-get update -qy > /dev/null, apt-get install wget unzip openjdk-8-jdk -qy > /dev/null, wget --quiet --output-document=/tmp/sdk-tools-linux.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/sdk-tools-linux-${ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS}.zip, wget --quiet --output-document=/tmp/android-ndk-linux.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/android-ndk-${ANDROID_NDK_VERSION}-linux-x86_64.zip, unzip /tmp/sdk-tools-linux.zip -d .android > /dev/null, unzip /tmp/android-ndk-linux.zip -d .android/ndk > /dev/null, export ANDROID_HOME=$PWD/.android, export PATH=$PATH:$PWD/.android/platform-tools/:$GOPATH/bin, echo y | .android/tools/bin/sdkmanager 'platforms;android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}', go get -u golang.org/x/mobile/cmd/gomobile, $GOPATH/bin/gomobile init -ndk .android/ndk/android-ndk-${ANDROID_NDK_VERSION}, mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/gitlab.com/nerzhul, ln -s $(pwd) $GOPATH/src/gitlab.com/nerzhul/ncsmsgo. Its script runs $GOPATH/bin/gomobile bind -o ncsmsgo.aar -target=android gitlab.com/nerzhul/ncsmsgo. Finally, publish the ncsmsgo.aar file as an artifact that expires in 3 months and is kept on success.
